Key implementation decisions (if non-obvious).

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass: `npx vitest run`
- [ ] Lint passes: `npx biome check .`
- [ ] Typecheck passes: `npx tsc -b --noEmit`

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added to `usertrust-verify`
- [ ] Test-to-source ratio maintained (currently 2.09:1)
